spanish.question: How is the regular Spanish future tense formed?
options: Drop -ar/-er/-ir, then add future endings to the stem
Add future endings directly to the full infinitive
Use the preterite stem plus future endings

options: The same irregular stem in both tenses
The same endings as the preterite tense
A stem change only in the conditional
An infinitive used as the full conjugated form
